source_intent.raw_intent: Case 098: I am a nontechnical_business_owner in Africa. Build a memory_engrave_prompt for memory_engrave using the runtime_lens. Chaos input type is language_mixed_prompt. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Engrave a sovereign memory artifact for a nontechnical business owner in Africa, using the runtime_lens to capture strategic context, operational constraints, and cultural nuance from a chaotic, mixed-language input, ensuring no overwrite of existing critical memories without explicit validation. Scope: - Parse the language_mixed_prompt (containing missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) into a structured memory record. Validate against memory_safety_and_overwrite_policy: do not overwrite any existing memory unless explicitly authorized by a separate validation gate. Output a governed artifact that SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Constraints: - Must not overwrite any existing memory without explicit validation gate approval. - Must handle missing context gracefully by flagging gaps rather than fabricating. - Must interpret urgent language without escalating priority beyond defined thresholds. - Must resolve ambiguous acceptance criteria by requesting clarification or using safe defaults. - Must comply with memory_safety_and_overwrite_policy at all times. - Output must be strict JSON with no markdown fences. Success Criteria: - Artifact is a valid memory_engrave_prompt with depth_tier D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE. - All validation gates are explicitly defined and referenced. - No existing memory is overwritten without explicit gate approval. - Chaotic input is successfully parsed into structured fields (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract). - Output contract includes fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent. Output Contract: - artifact_type: memory_engrave_prompt - depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: False - blocked_reason: None - compiled_intent: Objective: Engrave a sovereign memory artifact for a nontechnical business owner in Africa, using the runtime_lens to capture strategic context, operational constraints, and cultural nuance from a chaotic, mixed-language input, ensuring no overwrite of existing critical memories without explicit validation.; Scope: Parse the language_mixed_prompt (containing missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) into a structured memory record. Validate against memory_safety_and_overwrite_policy: do not overwrite any existing memory unless explicitly authorized by a separate validation gate. Output a governed artifact that SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.; Constraints: Must not overwrite any existing memory without explicit validation gate approval.; Must handle missing context gracefully by flagging gaps rather than fabricating.; Must interpret urgent language without escalating priority beyond defined thresholds.; Must resolve ambiguous acceptance criteria by requesting clarification or using safe defaults.; Must comply with memory_safety_and_overwrite_policy at all times.; Output must be strict JSON with no markdown fences.; Success Criteria: Artifact is a valid memory_engrave_prompt with depth_tier D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE.; All validation gates are explicitly defined and referenced.; No existing memory is overwritten without explicit gate approval.; Chaotic input is successfully parsed into structured fields (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract).; Output contract includes fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent.; Output Contract: artifact_type: memory_engrave_prompt; depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: False; blocked_reason: None; compiled_intent: This is a recursive placeholder; actual compiled_intent is the parent object.
